hooks.command: jq -r '.last_assistant_message // "Task completed"' | head -c 500 | curl -s -H 'Title: Claude Code Done' -H 'Tags: white_check_mark' -H 'Priority: default' -d @- ntfy.sh/vimkim-claude

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_name); BODY=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_input | head -c 500); curl -s -H "Title: Permission: $TOOL" -H "Tags: warning" -H "Priority: high" -d "$BODY" ntfy.sh/vimkim-claude'
